raw_cv_text:
Andile Vojtěch
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: andile.vojtech@outlook.com | LinkedIn: andile-vojtěch | GitHub: AndileVojtěch | https://andilev.dev
EDUCATION
ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology) | MSc Computer Science - Systems & Networks 2019 - 2021
Specialized in distributed systems and cloud infrastructure with focus on Kubernetes and container orchestration
Completed thesis on 'Optimizing Resource Allocation in Hybrid Cloud Environments' achieving distinction grade
University of Cape Town | BSc Computer Science 2015 - 2019
Graduated with honors in systems programming and network architecture
Elected class representative for software engineering cohort demonstrating leadership and communication skills
EXPERIENCE
Datadog | Site Reliability Engineer II March 2023 - Present
Architected and deployed automated incident response system reducing mean time to resolution (MTTR) by 67% across
12 production clusters
Implemented distributed tracing pipeline processing 2.3M events/second, improving service debugging efficiency by 4.5x
Led migration of legacy monolithic monitoring systems to microservices architecture, reducing infrastructure costs by
$340K annually
Cloudflare | SRE (Site Reliability Engineer) July 2021 - February 2023
Designed and maintained service mesh infrastructure serving 45M+ requests daily with 99.99% uptime SLA achievement
Automated deployment pipeline using Terraform and GitOps reducing production deployment time from 2.5 hours to 12
minutes (87.5% improvement)
Optimized database connection pooling strategy decreasing latency p99 by 340ms and increasing throughput capacity by
156%
Notion Labs | Junior Site Reliability Engineer November 2020 - June 2021
Implemented comprehensive observability framework with Prometheus and Grafana reducing incident detection time
from 18 minutes to 3 minutes
Built automated chaos engineering tests using LitmusChaos validating resilience of 28 critical microservices with 94%
fault detection accuracy
Contributed to on-call runbook standardization effort reducing incident resolution variance by 52% across platform teams
PROJECTS
KubeWatcher | Go, Kubernetes API, Prometheus, gRPC 2022 - 2023
Developed open-source Kubernetes observability tool with custom resource monitoring achieving 15K GitHub stars and
340+ community contributions
Engineered efficient state reconciliation algorithm reducing memory footprint by 72% enabling deployment on resource-
constrained edge clusters
FailSafe | Python, Redis, Apache Kafka, Docker 2021 - 2022
Built distributed circuit breaker and retry framework processing 8M+ transactions daily with 99.95% reliability
Implemented intelligent backoff strategies reducing cascading failures by 83% in microservice architectures under high
load conditions
LogAggregator Pro | Rust, Elasticsearch, Fluentd, Bash 2020 - 2021
Created high-performance log aggregation tool handling 500K logs/second with 3.2GB/hour data ingestion rate
Optimized indexing strategy reducing query response time by 78% and storage requirements by 64% using compression
techniques
AlertOptimizer | Python, Machine Learning, Grafana, SQLite 2022
Developed ML-based alert deduplication engine reducing false positive alerts by 71% and alert fatigue by 85%
Integrated with 12 major monitoring platforms generating actionable intelligence for 200+ enterprise customers
EXTRACURRICULAR
Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) | Community Ambassador & Kubernetes Mentor 2022 - Present
Mentored 18 junior engineers on SRE best practices and Kubernetes administration resulting in 100% transition to mid-
level roles
Organized monthly technical meetups with 200+ attendees on topics including observability, incident response, and
infrastructure automation
DevOps Europe Conference | Speaker & Workshop Facilitator 2023
Delivered keynote presentation 'Scaling Reliability at Global Scale' reaching 800+ live attendees and 12K+ video views
post-publication
Facilitated hands-on workshop on Kubernetes security and compliance best practices with 120 participants achieving 92%
satisfaction rating
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Go, Python, Rust, Bash, SQL, YAML
Technologies – Kubernetes, Docker, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Apache Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch,
Terraform, Ansible, ArgoCD
Tools – Git, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, PagerDuty, DataDog, Splunk, VictorOps, New Relic, AWS (EC2, RDS,
Lambda, EKS), GCP (GKE, Cloud Run), Linux/Unix
